metadata.title: Out of Touch
metadata.album: The Very Best of Daryl Hall / John Oates
metadata.lyrics:
[00:40.58] Shake it up is all that we know
[00:43.16] Using bodies up as we go
[00:47.35] I'm wakin' up to fantasy
[00:51.43] The shades all around aren't the colours we used to see
[00:56.54] Broken ice still melts in the sun
[01:00.00] And times that are broken can often be one again
[01:04.79] We're soul alone, and soul really matters to me
[01:10.14] Take a look around
[01:12.59] You're out of touch, I'm out of time (time)
[01:16.33] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[01:20.48] You're out of touch, I'm out of time (time)
[01:25.11] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[01:29.16] Oh, oh, oh
[01:34.95] Reachin' out for something to hold
[01:38.66] Looking for a love where the climate is cold
[01:42.72] Manic moves and drowsy dreams
[01:46.85] Or livin' in the middle between the two extremes
[01:51.83] Smoking guns hot to the touch
[01:55.32] Would cool down if we didn't use 'em so much, yeah
[02:00.14] We're soul alone, and soul really matters to me
[02:05.40] Too much
[02:08.00] You're out of touch, I'm out of time (time)
[02:11.91] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[02:16.32] You're out of touch, I'm out of time (time)
[02:20.43] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[02:24.89] Oh, oh, oh
[02:29.38] Ooh
[02:32.67] Oh, oh, oh
[02:40.85] Out of touch
[02:45.60] Out of touch
[02:51.23] Wow!
[02:53.74] You're out of touch, I'm out of time
[02:57.66] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[03:01.99] You're out of touch, I'm out of time (time)
[03:06.38] But I'm out of my head when you're not around (oh, 'round)
[03:10.30] You're out of touch (we're soul alone, girl), I'm out of time
[03:14.59] But I'm out of my head when you're not around (not around)
[03:19.26] You're out of touch, I'm out of time
[03:22.74] But I'm out of my head (out of touch, out of time, out of touch)
[03:25.09] When you're not around (out of time, girl)
[03:27.39] You're out of touch (reach out for something to hold), time
[03:31.33] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[03:35.40] (You're too cold) you're out of touch
[03:37.56] (Too cold, girl) I'm out of time
[03:39.29] (You're too cold, girl, yeah)
[03:41.77] Okay, and that is (not around)
[03:44.09] You're out of touch (out of touch)
[03:46.24] I'm out of time (out of time, out of touch)
[03:47.90] But I'm out of my head (out of time, out of touch)
[03:50.01] When you're not around (out of time, girl)
[03:52.59] You're out of touch, yeah, I'm out of time (time)
[03:56.11] But I'm out of my head when you're not around
[04:00.32] You're out of touch (focus), I'm out of time
